Bash(playwright-cli -s=main eval "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('input'\)\).map\(i => \({name: i.name, value: i.value, placeholder: i.placeholder, type: i.type}\)\).filter\(i => i.value || i.placeholder\)")

Bash(playwright-cli -s=main eval "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('input'\)\).map\(i => \({name: i.name, value: i.value, placeholder: i.placeholder, type: i.type}\)\).filter\(i => i.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('ship'\) || i.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('cost'\) || i.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('versand'\) || i.value === '1.80' || i.value === '1,80'\)")
